response:
Subject: Clarification Regarding Current Machine Vision Device

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I would like to thank you for your helpful and detailed response.

I believe there may be a misunderstanding regarding our current machine vision device. The model we are using is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor on this device is the Sony IMX172, not an e2V sensor. I have attached the technical data for your reference.

In the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file, please look at page 18 for the detailed datasheet. For information on Quantum efficiency, you can refer to the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, specifically page 13.

I will review the files and manuals more carefully and keep you informed.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
